data.title: Player resolves a board by tapping valid snakes
data.description: As a player, I can remove snakes when their exit paths are clear.

data.title: Player encounters obstacle and support elements
data.description: As a player, I see walls and Black Holes behave consistently with puzzle rules.
acceptance_criteria: Wall countdown decreases only on successful escapes
Black Hole teleport animation preserves snake flow

data.title: Player uses boosters from inventory or ad flow
data.description: As a player, I can activate Hint and Grid Vision with correct costs and visible effects.
acceptance_criteria: Grid Vision shows arrows for all snakes

data.title: Player receives daily and competitive rewards
data.description: As a player, I can earn recurring rewards and join tournament competition.
acceptance_criteria: Daily rewards map to documented values

data.title: QA verifies UI and backend operational coverage
data.description: As a QA team, we can cover visible screens and operational services from the GDD.
acceptance_criteria: Core screens are listed for QA
